PowerShell(python -c "from pypdf import PdfReader; r=PdfReader\(r'd:\\websitem\\Consulting\\brosura_umfst_2024_EN.pdf'\); open\(r'd:\\websitem\\Consulting\\_brochure_dump.txt','w',encoding='utf-8'\).write\(chr\(10\).join\([f'===== PAGE {i+1} ====='+chr\(10\)+\(p.extract_text\(\) or ''\) for i,p in enumerate\(r.pages\)]\)\); print\('PAGES', len\(r.pages\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PORT=3137; $p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput dev_out.log -RedirectStandardError dev_err.log -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 14; try { $codes = @\(\); foreach \($u in @\("http://localhost:3137/","http://localhost:3137/universities","http://localhost:3137/universities/umfst-targu-mures","http://localhost:3137/universities/umfst-targu-mures/faculties","http://localhost:3137/universities/umfst-targu-mures/student-life","http://localhost:3137/universities/bogomolets-nmu"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $codes += "$\($r.StatusCode\) $u" } catch { $codes += "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\) $u" } }; $codes } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput dev_out.log -RedirectStandardError dev_err.log -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 16; try { foreach \($u in @\("http://localhost:3000/","http://localhost:3000/admin/login","http://localhost:3000/login","http://localhost:3000/universities","http://localhost:3000/countries","http://localhost:3000/universities/umfst-targu-mures"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; "$\($r.StatusCode\) $u" } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\) $u" } } } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput dev2_out.log -RedirectStandardError dev2_err.log -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "GLOBERA"\) { "brand wordmark: present" }; if \($r.Content -match "visitors"\) { "visitor counter: present" } } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
